original_image_tags: A brown paper envelope or file folder cover. It features a diagonal "SECRET" stamp crossed out with a line. Another "SECRET" stamp is visible near the top center. A white typed index card or label is affixed to the center.

elements.description: Declassified label in top right corner with text: 'DECLASSIFIED', 'Authority:', 'NND 917033'.
Two red 'SECRET' stamps, one in top left and one in top right.

Typed white paper label attached to the center of a brown paper folder. Label contains text including 'EXHBIT #530', 'Serial C0196857 R/S', 'S-06200 dated 11-23-49', 'Subject: Flying Discs', 'REPORT FILED 7-5', 'AIRCRAFT - UNIDENTIFIED', 'JONES', and '2-27-50'.

judge.reason: The descriptions contradict on the number and color of SECRET stamps (one vs. two, and one specifies 'brown' while the other specifies 'red'), and Description B provides extensive quoted text from a central label that Description A does not mention at all.
